arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano transfer news: Man Utd free agent MESSAGE, Ronaldo RUMOURS, Enzo Fernandez TRUTH
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano transfer news: Man Utd free agent MESSAGE, Ronaldo RUMOURS, Enzo Fernandez TRUTH Fabrizio Romano has revealed the latest football transfers and news, with Manchester United, Chelsea, Barcelona and Cristiano Ronaldo among the subjects he has touched upon.
